name: Kissflow Work Platform REST API
what_it_does: Kissflow work platform REST API for enterprises and teams to automate business workflows, manage case-based processes, track project tasks, and build low-code applications — enabling automated process instance creation, task management, form data collection, and workflow monitoring through Kissflow's unified no-code work management platform. Enables AI agents to manage process management for workflow process instance creation and tracking automation, handle task management for user task assignment and completion automation, access form data management for process form field read and write automation, retrieve process monitoring for workflow status and bottleneck identification automation, manage app management for low-code Kissflow app record management automation, handle report management for process analytics and status report automation, access integration triggers for webhook-based workflow automation trigger management, retrieve activity management for workflow activity feed and audit trail automation, manage item management for dataset/spreadsheet-style record management automation, and integrate Kissflow with external systems, APIs, and enterprise applications for workflow automation.
use_cases: Automating approval workflows and routing for business operations automation agents
Managing and tracking work items across process stages for operations management automation agents
Building no-code business applications with automated data management for IT automation agents
Integrating external system events to trigger Kissflow workflows for enterprise automation agents
not_for: Complex BPMN-standard process modeling (Kissflow is simplified workflow, not full BPMN compliance like Camunda or Bizagi)
Large enterprise mission-critical process automation (Kissflow is mid-market; enterprise-grade BPM platforms offer more governance)
Deep SAP or Salesforce integration without additional middleware (Kissflow has API integrations but lacks pre-built native enterprise connectors)
best_when: A mid-market company or enterprise department team wanting AI agents to automate approval workflows, case management, and business process routing through Kissflow's no-code work management platform.
avoid_when: KISSFLOW PLAN REQUIRED: API access requires Kissflow subscription; automated free-API assumption creates plan_required; Kissflow API access requires paid plan; automated must have qualifying Kissflow subscription. PROCESS FORMS ARE DESIGN-DRIVEN: Workflow forms are designed in Kissflow UI; automated dynamic-form assumption creates field_not_found for form field operations using fields not defined in the form designer; automated must reference form fields as defined in Kissflow process design. WEBHOOK IS OUTBOUND-ONLY: Kissflow webhooks push events to external systems; automated inbound-trigger assumption creates no_trigger_received for workflows expecting external webhooks to create Kissflow items; automated must use Kissflow API for creating items from external triggers. ITEM IDs ARE INTERNAL: Kissflow item IDs are internally generated; automated stable-external-id assumption creates item_not_found for items referenced by business keys instead of Kissflow internal IDs; automated must retrieve and store Kissflow item IDs for subsequent operations.

auth.notes: Kissflow uses API key and OAuth2 for Work Platform REST API. REST API with JSON. Chennai, India HQ. Founded 2012 by Suresh Sambandam. Raised $75M (IGSB 2019). Products: Kissflow Process (workflow), Kissflow Case (case management), Kissflow Board (project), Kissflow App Builder. 10,000+ customers in 160 countries. Industries: manufacturing, financial services, education, healthcare. Competes with Nintex, Monday.com, and ServiceNow for workflow and work management platforms.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial: 14-day trial; Basic plan has limited API access; Small Business and above for full API
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly subscription per user; Small Business ($15/user), Corporate ($20/user), Enterprise (custom); API access on paid plans
pricing.notes: Chennai IN. $75M raised. 10,000+ customers. 160 countries. No-code workflow automation platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; workflow APIs throttled per subscription plan

known_agent_gotchas: PROCESS ITEM STATUS DETERMINES ACTIONS: Kissflow items in different stages have different available actions; automated any-action assumption creates action_not_available for operations on items not in the expected stage; automated must check item status before attempting stage-specific operations

FIELD TYPES REQUIRE CORRECT DATA FORMAT: Kissflow form fields have typed values (date, dropdown, user, etc.); automated string-only assumption creates field_validation_error for typed fields receiving incorrectly formatted values; automated must use correct data format per field type

ACCOUNT ID IS REQUIRED IN API CALLS: Kissflow API requires account ID parameter; automated no-account assumption creates missing_parameter for API calls without the account ID; automated must include account ID in all API requests

WEBHOOKS REQUIRE ACTIVE ENDPOINT: Kissflow webhooks require accessible public endpoint to deliver events; automated localhost assumption creates webhook_delivery_failure for endpoints not publicly accessible; automated must use publicly accessible endpoint for webhook registration

PROCESS NAMES ARE CASE-SENSITIVE: Kissflow process names in API URLs are case-sensitive; automated normalized-name assumption creates process_not_found for process names with incorrect casing; automated must use exact process names as configured in Kissflow
agent_readiness.security_notes: Workflow automation. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. API key. US/EU. Business process and form data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Workflow automation. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US/EU. Business workflow and process data.
